verses.1: The Mighty One, God, the LORD, speaks,
verses.2: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty,
verses.3: Our God comes, and does not keep silent.
verses.4: He calls to the heavens above,
verses.6: The heavens shall declare his righteousness,
verses.7: “Hear, my people, and I will speak.
verses.8: I don’t rebuke you for your sacrifices.
verses.9: I have no need for a bull from your stall,
verses.10: For every animal of the forest is mine,
verses.11: I know all the birds of the mountains.
verses.12: If I were hungry, I would not tell you,
verses.13: Will I eat the meat of bulls,
verses.14: Offer to God the sacrifice of thanksgiving.
verses.15: Call on me in the day of trouble.
verses.16: But to the wicked God says,
verses.18: When you saw a thief, you consented with him,
verses.20: You sit and speak against your brother.
verses.21: You have done these things, and I kept silent.
verses.22: “Now consider this, you who forget God,
verses.23: Whoever offers the sacrifice of thanksgiving glorifies me,
